name: jolt-pickleball-club
description: Marketing, shop and court-booking site for Jolt Pickleball Club — paddles, apparel, nets, court tiles, and hourly court reservations with online payment.

scripts.dev: npm run build && npx --yes http-server dist -p 8080 -c-1
scripts.server:dev: npm run build && npx --yes nodemon server/index.js
